prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年武汉理工大学在海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为约3544名、3694名、3176名、3845名、3746名。近5年位次波动较大，2023年曾回升至3176名，但2 024年回落至3845名，2025年小幅回升至3746名，整体呈震荡后移态势，近3年均值约3589名，2025年基准位次为3746名；该校在海南省招生计划2021年60人、20 22年58人、2023年57人、2024年57人、2025年63人，2026年增至66人，较2025年扩招3人（增幅约4.8%）。扩招意味着竞争略有缓解，但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 武汉理工大学是教育部直属的211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜2026年排名第54位，近年排名稳定在48–55区间，属于中上水平211高校，在理工科领域具有 较强综合实力；2026年高考周期内该校声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及南湖校区周边不明巨型生物活动事件，可能对考生报考心理产生轻微抑制作用；抖音热度总 排名第98位（评价一般），未出现高热关注；历史投档异常记录中未见该校身影，说明未出现明显断档或暴跌；第五轮学科评估中，材料科学与工程获评A，交 通运输工程、机械工程获评A-，三个学科均为A-及以上。材料科学与工程是该校王牌学科，与招生专业中的材料类直接对应；交通运输类、机械类（车辆/智能制造）等招生专业 也与优势学科高度匹配，对理工类考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度持续高热推荐，武汉理工大学在 上述领域均有对应招生专业，有利于吸引高分考生；材料类（属生化环材大类）社会热度为明显劝退，可能对相关专业报考产生一定压力。海南省2026年高考考生约78000人（较2 025年67408人增长约15.7%），考生规模显著扩大将加剧整体竞争；武汉理工 大学位于湖北省武汉市，非海南省本地高校，在海南无特殊地域偏好优势；该校在海南招生计划约60余人，占比较小，地域因素对位次影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基 准位次3746名、2026年扩招3人（位次数字增大方向）、海南省考生总数大幅增长约15.7%（竞争加剧，位次数字增大方向）、声誉偏负面（轻微抑制报考，位次数字增大方向）以 及优势学科对理工考生的吸引力（位次数字减小方向）等多重因素，扩招与考生增长的正向效应占主导，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅后移。预测最低位次约3883名，区 间3383–4383名。

一档（最难进）

- 电子信息类（电子信息工程、电子科学与技术、智能科学与技术、通信工程）

- 机械类（车辆）（车辆工程、汽车服务工程、能源与动力工程、储能科学与工程）

二档（中等）
- 数学类（信息与计算科学、统计学）
- 材料类（材料成型及控制工程、材料科学与工程、无机非金属材料工程等）
- 机械类（智能制造）（机械工程、智能制造工程、测控技术与仪器、工业工程）
- 机械设计制造及其自动化
- 交通运输类（交通运输、交通工程、交通设备与控制工程）
- 信息管理与信息系统
- 化工与制药类（含生物方向）
- 船舶与海洋工程

- 地理信息科学
- 电气工程及其自动化
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工商管理类（人力资源管理、工商管理、会计学、创业管理）
- 经济学类（经济学、金融学）
- 法学类（法学、知识产权、社会工作）
- 外国语言文学类（英语、法语）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约3883名，区间3383–4383名。位次在区间下限（3383名）附近或更优时，可重点冲刺一档的计算机类、电子信息类、自动化类等热门专业；位次在3883名左右时，建议 以二档的材料类（王牌学科A级）、机械类（A-）、交通运输类（A-）等优势专业为主攻方向，兼顾数学类、信息管理与信息系统等中等难度专业；位次在区间上限（4383名）附 近时，可考虑三档的工商管理类、经济学类、法学类等作为保底选择。注意材料类虽学科评估A级但社会热度偏低，可能存在性价比机会。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Wuhan University of Technology in Hainan Province's comprehensive category were approximately 3544, 3694, 3176, 3845, and 3746 respectively. Rankings fluctuated significantly over the past five years, rebounding to 3176 in 2023 but falling back to 3845 in 2024, then slightly recovering to 3746 in 2025, showing an overall oscillating and declining trend. The average over the past three years is about 3589, with a baseline ranking of 3746 in 2025. The enrollment plan in Hainan Province was 60 in 2021, 58 in 2022, 57 in 2023, 57 in 2024, and 63 in 2025, increasing to 66 in 2026, an expansion of 3 students compared to 2025 (an increase of about 4.8%). The expansion means slightly eased competition, but the extent is limited.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university directly under the Ministry of Education. It ranks 54th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, with stable rankings in the 48–55 range in recent years, placing it among mid-to-upper level 211 universities with strong comprehensive strength in engineering fields. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving reports of unidentified giant biological activity near the Nanhu campus, which may mildly suppress candidates' application psychology. Its Douyin popularity ranks 98th overall (average evaluation), without high attention. No historical abnormal admission records were found for this university, indicating no obvious breaks or crashes. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Materials Science and Engineering was rated A, Transportation Engineering and Mechanical Engineering were rated A-, with three disciplines at A- or above. Materials Science and Engineering is the university's flagship discipline, directly corresponding to the Materials category in enrollment majors. Transportation, Mechanical (Vehicle/Intelligent Manufacturing) and other enrollment majors also highly match advantageous disciplines, strongly attracting science and engineering candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended with sustained social popularity. Wuhan University of Technology has corresponding enrollment majors in these fields, helping attract high-scoring candidates. The Materials category (part of the Biology, Chemistry, Environment, Materials group) has significantly discouraged social popularity, potentially putting pressure on related major applications. In 2026, the number of college entrance examination candidates in Hainan Province is about 78,000 (an increase of about 15.7% from 67,408 in 2025), significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying overall competition. Wuhan University of Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei Province, not a local university in Hainan, with no special regional preference advantage. Its enrollment plan in Hainan is about 60 students, a small proportion, so regional factors have limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors including the 2025 baseline ranking of 3746, the 2026 expansion of 3 students (direction of increasing ranking number), the significant 15.7% increase in total candidates in Hainan Province (intensified competition, direction of increasing ranking number), slightly negative reputation (mildly suppressing applications, direction of increasing ranking number), and the attractiveness of advantageous disciplines to science and engineering candidates (direction of decreasing ranking number), the positive effects of expansion and candidate growth dominate. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly decline compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 3883, with a range of 3383–4383.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 3883, with a range of 3383–4383. When the ranking is near or better than the lower limit of the range (3383), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors such as Computer Category, Electronic Information Category, and Automation Category. When the ranking is around 3883, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 advantageous majors like Materials Category (flagship discipline rated A), Mechanical Category (A-), and Transportation Category (A-), while also considering medium-difficulty majors like Mathematics Category and Information Management and Information Systems. When the ranking is near the upper limit of the range (4383), consider Tier 3 majors such as Business Administration Category, Economics Category, and Law Category as safety choices. Note that although the Materials Category has a discipline evaluation of A, its social popularity is low, potentially offering cost-effective opportunities.
